content.en:
The task is to be a guinea pig.

Many powerhouses in the Void Heaven Palace are trying to create some special secret techniques, all of which are a group of people who exist in the ninth realm to impact the Ultimate Realm Lord, and they have no hope of breaking through, so they can only start with various secret techniques.

And many secret techniques are extremely incomplete, and the sequelae are very large, and he doesn't dare to cultivate, so he can only find some guinea mice in the eighth and ninth realms to cultivate, or let these eighth and ninth realms study.

And according to the research results, so as to give a certain contribution value.

If you can't research anything, there will be no reward.

Ye Tian could completely use the copy body to test these incomplete secret techniques, so as to perfect them, so that he could obtain a large amount of contribution points.

It's a mission that's just for him!

Subsequently, Ye Tian received such a task, and then obtained a mutilated secret technique.

【Dragon Devouring Secret Technique】

This secret technique is mainly used to devour some special materials to enhance one's flesh.

For example, devouring the fragments of some multidimensional stars, so as to make the physical body extremely tough and powerful.

However, this secret technique is still very incomplete, and the effect of devouring multidimensional star fragments is very average, and the side effects are very large.

After obtaining the Dragon Devouring Secret Technique, Ye Tian focused on cultivating and perfecting the Dragon Devouring Secret Technique.

"The secret technique of the mystery, even if it is a mutilated secret technique, it can be seen that the strong person who created it is absolutely extremely powerful!"

In the days that followed, Ye Tian focused on cultivating and perfecting this Dragon Devouring Secret Technique.

In order to be able to perfect the Dragon Devouring Secret Technique as soon as possible, he asked multiple replicators to try, and used various multi-dimensional star weapons to deduce the analysis.

In countless attempts, the Dragon Devouring Secret Technique was perfected by him little by little.

In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of domain yuan years have passed.

"The Dragon Devouring Secret Technique has been perfected by me a lot, there is no need to perfect it thoroughly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it is thoroughly perfected, it will be suspected that it is abnormal.

So, it's okay to perfect it to this extent.

After that, he handed over the perfected Dragon Devouring Secret Technique and waited for the Void Heaven Palace to assess.

......

Void Heaven Palace.

Hall of the Cold Heavens.

At this time, the Hall Master of the Cold Heaven Palace, the Lord of the Cold Heaven Realm, was evaluating the Dragon Devouring Secret Technique submitted by Ye Tian, and he deduced it a little, and was immediately shocked.

"It actually increased the effect of the Dragon Devouring Secret Technique by sixty percent, reduced the side effects by three percent, and the degree of perfection increased by at least fifty percent, which is very good. "

The Cold Heaven Realm Lord gave an extremely high evaluation, and through this evaluation, Ye Tian could obtain extremely high contribution points from this mission.

Soon after, Ye Tian gained a large number of contribution points.

"Yes, you can use these contribution points to comprehend the Void Heaven Monument and enter a place where you can quickly improve your cultivation. "

Ye Tian soon came to the Void Heaven Pool, which was the most suitable place to improve the cultivation of the Ninth Realm, and there was a Void Heaven Divine Liquid in it, which was said to be a resource from the Dimension Sea.

The Void Heaven Divine Liquid was purple, containing terrifying energy fluctuations.

When Ye Tian entered here, he entered the Void Heaven Pool to cultivate, absorbing the energy of the Void Heaven Divine Liquid to improve his cultivation.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation is skyrocketing rapidly, and the efficiency of cultivation is far beyond the past.

"This is cultivation!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian's cultivation officially broke through to the middle realm of the ninth realm.

Then, he continued to cultivate, and he wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the ninth realm through the Void Heaven Pool.

And this cultivation has passed 500,000 domain yuan years.

At this time, Ye Tian's contribution value was almost exhausted.

After all, he not only had to cultivate in the Void Heaven Pool, but also had to comprehend the Void Heaven Monument, and the contribution value consumed was naturally extremely large.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through again, and he had already reached the peak realm of the ninth realm.

And over the years, his supreme dimensional rules have also been greatly improved, and now he has been raised to the realm of eighty supreme dimensional rules.

It can be said that his strength is much stronger now than in the past.

And over the years, he has also once again created the second Nine Realms Supreme Peerless Sect - Zhou Tian Star Dou Diagram, which is an upgraded version of Zhou Tian's multi-dimensional painting, the effect of the main defense and suppression seal.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian perfected several secret techniques and gained a lot of contribution points.

At this time, he mainly went to the Void Heaven Monument to improve his supreme dimensional rules.

Time flies.

A million domain yuan years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian comprehended the one hundred and eight supreme dimensional rules, and at this time he fell into the rule bottleneck of the supreme dimensional rules, even the Nine Realms Supreme Absolute Sect could not break this bottleneck.

"It seems that you have to master an Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move to break this bottleneck!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, his supreme dimensional rules can't be improved, his cultivation can't be improved, and his soul will has also been raised to the eighteenth limit during this time.

It can be said that he has reached his limit in every way.

If he wants to continue to break through, there is only one way, to master an ultimate dimensional killing move.

"I can only go to the dimensional world!"

In order to master the ultimate dimensional killing move, he constantly learned about this information and the situation of the dimensional heaven and earth.

There are many special dimensional worlds in the Dimension Sea, but he wants to go to a dimension world that suits him.

According to the information of the Void Heaven Palace, he finally made a decision.

"Let's go to this dimensional world!"

"Divine Dimension!"

This dimension of heaven and earth is the path of the body of the god dimension, which is a special dimensional power called the god dimension, which is mainly based on the physical body, advocating the invincible path of the physical body.

The reason why Ye Tian went to this place was because this dimensional heaven and earth paid attention to talent, and it was said that every dimensional creature had divine dimensional talent. (Okay)

Ye Tian felt that if he had been in the past, he might be able to copy this divine talent, and then continue to fuse and upgrade to create the most terrifying divine talent.

In that case, he would be able to reach the limit on the path of the Divine Dimension Body, and there would be great hope of creating his own Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move.

And before preparing to go to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, Ye Tian still needs to deal with the affairs of the human race.

... Ear...

Terran.

Ye Tian called his son Ye Xingchen, his wife and daughter, and other high-ranking Terran officials.

"Next, I will fall into a deep sleep, don't come and disturb me until the life and death of the human race! "

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes!"

Many Terran powerhouses responded.

And he also put many resources in the Terran treasury, and then began to put all the replica bodies into a deep sleep.

Only the replica body of the Void Heaven Palace remained.。。
